title: PR and Branch Review Ledger
concept: A two-column Playground console that treats vanilla starts, WordPress PR previews, Gutenberg PR or branch previews, GitHub imports, Blueprint URLs, and ZIP imports as launch contracts recorded in an operations ledger beside a protected live WordPress shell.
flows: Change WordPress, PHP, language, older-version, network, and multisite settings, review Save & Reload for a browser-saved Playground, confirm progress, and update the final runtime badge while preserving the saved identity
Preview the unsaved reset warning, cancel or confirm destructive reset, show reset progress, and fall back to a temporary Playground state with path and preview mutation
Delete the selected saved Playground with warning, cancel, confirm, progress, final row removal, and active shell fallback to Unsaved Playground

Launch or import through distinct contracts for Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import with account connection, Blueprint URL, and ZIP import with chooser and replacement warning
Save in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct destination consequences, progress states, storage badges, row selection, and event history
Use Site Manager tabs for settings, files, Blueprint editor, database, logs, Export to GitHub, zip download, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions while the live shell remains visible
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start
WordPress PR preview with PR number or URL input
Gutenberg PR or branch preview with PR, URL, or branch input
GitHub import with account connection and non-persistent token caveat
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with chooser state and replacement warning
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest representative subset of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts and selected Blueprint detail
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Save to a local directory with folder permission consequence
Save progress with file counts
Saved, local-directory, and unsaved Playground list
Open, manage, rename, delete confirmation, delete cancel, delete progress, row removal, and fallback state
Active path input, refresh, Homepage, WP Admin, temporary/saved/local state, Save, and reset/reload consequences
Site Manager settings, file browser, Blueprint, database, logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip
Files create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty marker, save, and result state
Blueprint editor with URL, copy, download, run, validation, and result state
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with realistic notice state
GitHub import/export
ZIP import/download
database download
Blueprint bundle actions
Transfer history and event stream for save, rename, delete, import, export, download, settings, and preview actions
